​​​​​​​​​​​

Local Cooling Center Contact Information

Main_Content

​

​County / City​​​​​​​​​​​
​Main Phone number
​Main Website Link​
​Current Cooling Center Information
Additional Contact Information
Allegany County
​301-759-5000
Allegany County Health Department
​During extreme heat, local branches of the Allegany County Library System, which serve as public cooling spaces.
​Department of Emergency Services: 301-876-9155
​Anne Arundel County
410-768-5522​​​Anne Arundel County Department of Health
​Information on current cooling center locations.​

City of Annapolis cooling center information.​
​Office of Emergency Management: 410-222-0600
City of Annapolis Office of Emergency Management: 410-216-9167
​Baltimore City
​Call 311
​Baltimore City Health Department
Information on current cooling center locations​.​​
​
​Baltimore County 
​410-887-BCHD (2243)
​Baltimore County Department of Health 
Information on current cooling center locations​.​
​
​Calvert County
​410-535-5400​
​Calvert County Health Department
Get more information here.​
​Division of Emergency Mangement​: 
410-535-3491 (Non-emergency number)
410-535-1600, ext. 2638​
​Caroline County
​410-479-2222 (available 24/7)​
​Caroline County Health Department​​
Libraries that serve as cooling centers:
  • Denton Library: 410-479-1343, Note: open Saturday, July 4th from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.​
  • Federalsburg Library: 410-754-8397
  • Greensboro Library: 410-482-2173
​​
​Carroll County
​410-876-2152​​
​Carroll County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​
​Carroll County Citizen Services: 410-386-3600
​Cecil County
​410-996-5550
​Cecil County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​
​
​Charles County
​301-609-3400
​Charles County Health Department
Information on current cooling center locations.​
​

​Dorchester County​​
​410-228-3223​​
​​Dorchester County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​
If you or someone you know does not have AC or is unhoused, please call the Dorchester Temporary Shelter at 443-477-2219.
​Frederick County

​301-600-1029 (press 9 when prompted)
​Frederick County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.
​
​​Garrett County
​301-334-7280​
​Garrett County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​

​301-334-1929 (available 24/7)
301-334-1930​


​Harford County

​410-838-5800
​Harford County Health Department
Information on current cooling center locations.​​
​Harford County Department of Emergency Services: 410-638-4900


​Howard County
​410-313-2022
​Howard County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​
​
​​Kent County​

​410-778-1350
​​Kent County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.
Office of Emergency Services​: 410-778-1241 (available 24/7)
​Montgomery County
​Call 311
​Montgomery County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​
​Daytime Cooling Centers: 240-907-2688
Emergency Shelter: 240-777-4000 or Call 311

​Prince George's County
​301-883-7879
​Prince George's County Health Department
Interactive map of PG County Cooling Centers​
​
​Queen Anne's County

410-758-0720
Queen Anne's County Department of Health​​
​Information on current cooling center locations.​

Additional location: Thursday, July 2 – Friday, July 3 - 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Ink or Dye Studio
106 N Commerce Street, Centreville, MD
(443) 262-8042​
Department of Emergency Services: 410-758-4500​

​​Somerset County
​443-523-1700
Somerset County Health Department​
Thursday 7/2: Crisfield and Princess Anne Libraries: 9 a.m. - 4:45 p.m.

Friday 7/3: Crisfield Fire Department: 10 a.m. - 7 p.m.
UMES Student Services Center Ballroom: 10 a.m. - 6 p.m.

Saturday 7/4: UMES Student Services Center Ballroom: 10 a.m. - 6 p.m.​

​
​St. Mary's County
240-577-0702​

​St. Mary's County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​​
​
Talbot County
410-819-5600
​
​​Talbot County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​​
​410-822-0095 (for after-hours assistance)​​
​Washington County

240-313-3200
​Washington County Health Department​
​
​Reach of Washington County: ​301-733-2371​
Wicomico County​

​410-749-1244
​Wicomico County Health Department
​Information on current cooling center locations.​​​
​
​Worcester County


​410-632-1311​

​Worcester County Department of Health
​Berlin, Ocean City & Ocean Pines branch libraries & the temporary Pocomoke & Snow Hill branch locations will be open Friday, July 3, but will be
closed Saturday-Sunday, July 4-5.

The Worcester County Recreation Center in Snow Hill will be closed July 3-4, but will be open July 5 from 9 a.m. to 3 p.m.

Northside Park will be the only cooling center location this weekend, operating Friday & Saturday 9am-9pm. ​​
​

​​

201 W. Preston Street, Baltimore, MD 21201
